## Class `uvm_analysis_export`

Module: `pyuvm`

The most basic UVM object

### Constructor

Signature: `uvm_analysis_export(self, name, parent)`

Inputs

| Name | Kind | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `name` | `POSITIONAL_OR_KEYWORD` | `str` | `required` | The name of the component. Used in the UVM hierarchy |
| `parent` | `POSITIONAL_OR_KEYWORD` | `uvm_component` | `required` | The parent component.  If None, the parent is uvm_root |

Output: `uvm_analysis_export` instance

## Class `uvm_analysis_imp`

Module: `pyuvm`

A ``uvm_port_base`` is a uvm_component with a ``connect()`` function.

### Constructor

Signature: `uvm_analysis_imp(self, name, parent)`

Inputs

| Name | Kind | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `name` | `POSITIONAL_OR_KEYWORD` | `str` | `required` | The name of the component. Used in the UVM hierarchy |
| `parent` | `POSITIONAL_OR_KEYWORD` | `uvm_component` | `required` | The parent component.  If None, the parent is uvm_root |

Output: `uvm_analysis_imp` instance

### Methods

## Class `uvm_analysis_port`

Module: `pyuvm`

A ``uvm_port_base`` is a uvm_component with a ``connect()`` function.

### Constructor

Signature: `uvm_analysis_port(self, name, parent)`

Inputs

| Name | Kind | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `name` | `POSITIONAL_OR_KEYWORD` | `str` | `required` | The name of the component. Used in the UVM hierarchy |
| `parent` | `POSITIONAL_OR_KEYWORD` | `uvm_component` | `required` | The parent component.  If None, the parent is uvm_root |

Output: `uvm_analysis_port` instance

### Methods

## Class `uvm_blocking_get_export`

Module: `pyuvm`

The most basic UVM object

### Constructor

Signature: `uvm_blocking_get_export(self, name, parent)`

Inputs

| Name | Kind | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `name` | `POSITIONAL_OR_KEYWORD` | `str` | `required` | The name of the component. Used in the UVM hierarchy |
| `parent` | `POSITIONAL_OR_KEYWORD` | `uvm_component` | `required` | The parent component.  If None, the parent is uvm_root |

Output: `uvm_blocking_get_export` instance

## Class `uvm_blocking_get_peek_export`

Module: `pyuvm`

The most basic UVM object

### Constructor

Signature: `uvm_blocking_get_peek_export(self, name, parent)`

Inputs

| Name | Kind | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `name` | `POSITIONAL_OR_KEYWORD` | `str` | `required` | The name of the component. Used in the UVM hierarchy |
| `parent` | `POSITIONAL_OR_KEYWORD` | `uvm_component` | `required` | The parent component.  If None, the parent is uvm_root |

Output: `uvm_blocking_get_peek_export` instance

## Class `uvm_blocking_get_peek_port`

Module: `pyuvm`

Access the blocking get export methods

| `parent` | `POSITIONAL_OR_KEYWORD` | `uvm_component` | `required` | The parent component.  If None, the parent is uvm_root |

## Class `uvm_blocking_get_port`

Module: `pyuvm`

Access the blocking get export methods

| Name | Kind | Type | Default | Description |

| `parent` | `POSITIONAL_OR_KEYWORD` | `uvm_component` | `required` | The parent component.  If None, the parent is uvm_root |

## Class `uvm_blocking_master_export`

Module: `pyuvm`

The most basic UVM object

### Constructor

Signature: `uvm_blocking_master_export(self, name, parent)`

Inputs

## Class `uvm_blocking_master_port`

Module: `pyuvm`

Access the blocking put interfaces

### Constructor

Signature: `uvm_blocking_master_port(self, name, parent)`

Inputs

| Name | Kind | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `name` | `POSITIONAL_OR_KEYWORD` | `str` | `required` | The name of the component. Used in the UVM hierarchy |
| `parent` | `POSITIONAL_OR_KEYWORD` | `uvm_component` | `required` | The parent component.  If None, the parent is uvm_root |

Output: `uvm_blocking_master_port` instance

## Class `uvm_blocking_peek_export`

Module: `pyuvm`

The most basic UVM object

### Constructor

Signature: `uvm_blocking_peek_export(self, name, parent)`

Inputs

| Name | Kind | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `name` | `POSITIONAL_OR_KEYWORD` | `str` | `required` | The name of the component. Used in the UVM hierarchy |
| `parent` | `POSITIONAL_OR_KEYWORD` | `uvm_component` | `required` | The parent component.  If None, the parent is uvm_root |

Output: `uvm_blocking_peek_export` instance

## Class `uvm_blocking_peek_port`

Module: `pyuvm`

Provides access to the peek methods

### Constructor

Signature: `uvm_blocking_peek_port(self, name, parent)`

Inputs

| Name | Kind | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `name` | `POSITIONAL_OR_KEYWORD` | `str` | `required` | The name of the component. Used in the UVM hierarchy |
| `parent` | `POSITIONAL_OR_KEYWORD` | `uvm_component` | `required` | The parent component.  If None, the parent is uvm_root |

Output: `uvm_blocking_peek_port` instance

### Methods

## Class `uvm_blocking_put_export`

Module: `pyuvm`

The most basic UVM object

### Constructor

Signature: `uvm_blocking_put_export(self, name, parent)`

Inputs

| Name | Kind | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `name` | `POSITIONAL_OR_KEYWORD` | `str` | `required` | The name of the component. Used in the UVM hierarchy |
| `parent` | `POSITIONAL_OR_KEYWORD` | `uvm_component` | `required` | The parent component.  If None, the parent is uvm_root |

Output: `uvm_blocking_put_export` instance

## Class `uvm_blocking_put_port`

Module: `pyuvm`

Access the blocking put interfaces

### Constructor

Signature: `uvm_blocking_put_port(self, name, parent)`

Inputs

| Name | Kind | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `name` | `POSITIONAL_OR_KEYWORD` | `str` | `required` | The name of the component. Used in the UVM hierarchy |
| `parent` | `POSITIONAL_OR_KEYWORD` | `uvm_component` | `required` | The parent component.  If None, the parent is uvm_root |

Output: `uvm_blocking_put_port` instance

## Class `uvm_blocking_slave_export`

Module: `pyuvm`

The most basic UVM object

### Constructor

Signature: `uvm_blocking_slave_export(self, name, parent)`

Inputs

| Name | Kind | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `name` | `POSITIONAL_OR_KEYWORD` | `str` | `required` | The name of the component. Used in the UVM hierarchy |
| `parent` | `POSITIONAL_OR_KEYWORD` | `uvm_component` | `required` | The parent component.  If None, the parent is uvm_root |

Output: `uvm_blocking_slave_export` instance

## Class `uvm_blocking_slave_port`

Module: `pyuvm`

Access the blocking put interfaces

### Constructor

Signature: `uvm_blocking_slave_port(self, name, parent)`

Inputs

| Name | Kind | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `name` | `POSITIONAL_OR_KEYWORD` | `str` | `required` | The name of the component. Used in the UVM hierarchy |
| `parent` | `POSITIONAL_OR_KEYWORD` | `uvm_component` | `required` | The parent component.  If None, the parent is uvm_root |

Output: `uvm_blocking_slave_port` instance

## Class `uvm_blocking_transport_export`

Module: `pyuvm`

The most basic UVM object

### Constructor

Signature: `uvm_blocking_transport_export(self, name, parent)`

Inputs

| Name | Kind | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `name` | `POSITIONAL_OR_KEYWORD` | `str` | `required` | The name of the component. Used in the UVM hierarchy |
| `parent` | `POSITIONAL_OR_KEYWORD` | `uvm_component` | `required` | The parent component.  If None, the parent is uvm_root |

Output: `uvm_blocking_transport_export` instance

## Class `uvm_blocking_transport_port`

Module: `pyuvm`

A ``uvm_port_base`` is a uvm_component with a ``connect()`` function.

### Constructor

Signature: `uvm_blocking_transport_port(self, name, parent)`

Inputs

| Name | Kind | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `name` | `POSITIONAL_OR_KEYWORD` | `str` | `required` | The name of the component. Used in the UVM hierarchy |
| `parent` | `POSITIONAL_OR_KEYWORD` | `uvm_component` | `required` | The parent component.  If None, the parent is uvm_root |

Output: `uvm_blocking_transport_port` instance

### Methods

## Class `uvm_bottomup_phase`

Module: `pyuvm`

Runs the phases from bottom up.

### Constructor

Signature: `uvm_bottomup_phase(self, name='')`

| Name | Kind | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `name` | `POSITIONAL_OR_KEYWORD` | `str` | `''` | Name of the object. Default is empty string. |

## Class `uvm_component`

Module: `pyuvm`

The most basic UVM object

### Constructor

Signature: `uvm_component(self, name, parent)`

Inputs

| Name | Kind | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `name` | `POSITIONAL_OR_KEYWORD` | `str` | `required` | The name of the component. Used in the UVM hierarchy |
| `parent` | `POSITIONAL_OR_KEYWORD` | `uvm_component` | `required` | The parent component.  If None, the parent is uvm_root |

Output: `uvm_component` instance

### Methods

## Class `uvm_connect_phase`

Module: `pyuvm`

Runs the phases from bottom up.

### Constructor

## Class `uvm_export_base`

Module: `pyuvm`

The most basic UVM object

### Constructor

Signature: `uvm_export_base(self, name, parent)`

Inputs

| Name | Kind | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `name` | `POSITIONAL_OR_KEYWORD` | `str` | `required` | The name of the component. Used in the UVM hierarchy |
| `parent` | `POSITIONAL_OR_KEYWORD` | `uvm_component` | `required` | The parent component.  If None, the parent is uvm_root |

Output: `uvm_export_base` instance

### Methods

## Class `uvm_extract_phase`

Module: `pyuvm`

Runs phases from the top down.

### Constructor

Signature: `uvm_extract_phase(self, name='')`

Inputs

| Name | Kind | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `name` | `POSITIONAL_OR_KEYWORD` | `str` | `''` | Name of the object. Default is empty string. |

## Class `uvm_factory`

Module: `pyuvm`

The uvm_factory is a singleton that delivers all UVM factory functions.

| Name | Kind | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| (none) | - | - | - | No input parameters. |

|---|---|---|---|---|

#### `uvm_factory.create_component_by_name`

Create a components using the name of the requested uvm_component type

Signature: `create_component_by_name(self, requested_type_name, parent_inst_path='', name='', parent=None)`

Inputs

| Name | Kind | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `requested_type_name` | `POSITIONAL_OR_KEYWORD` | `str` | `required` | the type that could be overridden |
| `parent_inst_path` | `POSITIONAL_OR_KEYWORD` | `str` | `''` | A path if we are checking for inst overrides |
| `name` | `POSITIONAL_OR_KEYWORD` | `str` | `''` | The name of the new object. |
| `parent` | `POSITIONAL_OR_KEYWORD` | `uvm_component` | `None` | The component's parent component |

Output: `object`

## Class `uvm_get_export`

Module: `pyuvm`

The most basic UVM object

### Constructor

Signature: `uvm_get_export(self, name, parent)`

Inputs

| Name | Kind | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `name` | `POSITIONAL_OR_KEYWORD` | `str` | `required` | The name of the component. Used in the UVM hierarchy |
| `parent` | `POSITIONAL_OR_KEYWORD` | `uvm_component` | `required` | The parent component.  If None, the parent is uvm_root |

Output: `uvm_get_export` instance

## Class `uvm_get_peek_export`

Module: `pyuvm`

The most basic UVM object

### Constructor

Signature: `uvm_get_peek_export(self, name, parent)`

Inputs

| Name | Kind | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `name` | `POSITIONAL_OR_KEYWORD` | `str` | `required` | The name of the component. Used in the UVM hierarchy |
| `parent` | `POSITIONAL_OR_KEYWORD` | `uvm_component` | `required` | The parent component.  If None, the parent is uvm_root |

## Class `uvm_get_peek_port`

Module: `pyuvm`

Access the blocking get export methods

### Constructor

Signature: `uvm_get_peek_port(self, name, parent)`

Inputs

| Name | Kind | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `name` | `POSITIONAL_OR_KEYWORD` | `str` | `required` | The name of the component. Used in the UVM hierarchy |
| `parent` | `POSITIONAL_OR_KEYWORD` | `uvm_component` | `required` | The parent component.  If None, the parent is uvm_root |

Output: `uvm_get_peek_port` instance

## Class `uvm_get_port`

Module: `pyuvm`

Access the blocking get export methods

### Constructor

Signature: `uvm_get_port(self, name, parent)`

Inputs

| Name | Kind | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `name` | `POSITIONAL_OR_KEYWORD` | `str` | `required` | The name of the component. Used in the UVM hierarchy |
| `parent` | `POSITIONAL_OR_KEYWORD` | `uvm_component` | `required` | The parent component.  If None, the parent is uvm_root |

Output: `uvm_get_port` instance

### Methods

#### `uvm_get_port.add_child`

| Name | Kind | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|

| `child` | `POSITIONAL_OR_KEYWORD` | `object` | `required` | Parameter. |

## Class `uvm_master_export`

Module: `pyuvm`

The most basic UVM object

### Constructor

Signature: `uvm_master_export(self, name, parent)`

Inputs

| Name | Kind | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `name` | `POSITIONAL_OR_KEYWORD` | `str` | `required` | The name of the component. Used in the UVM hierarchy |
| `parent` | `POSITIONAL_OR_KEYWORD` | `uvm_component` | `required` | The parent component.  If None, the parent is uvm_root |

## Class `uvm_master_port`

Module: `pyuvm`

Access the blocking put interfaces

### Constructor

Signature: `uvm_master_port(self, name, parent)`

Inputs

| Name | Kind | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `name` | `POSITIONAL_OR_KEYWORD` | `str` | `required` | The name of the component. Used in the UVM hierarchy |
| `parent` | `POSITIONAL_OR_KEYWORD` | `uvm_component` | `required` | The parent component.  If None, the parent is uvm_root |

Output: `uvm_master_port` instance

## Class `uvm_mem`

Module: `pyuvm`

The most basic UVM object

### Constructor

Signature: `uvm_mem(self, name: 'str', size: 'int', n_bits: 'int', access: 'str' = 'RW', has_coverage: 'int' = <uvm_coverage_model_e.UVM_NO_COVERAGE: 0>) -> 'None'`

Inputs

| Name | Kind | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `name` | `POSITIONAL_OR_KEYWORD` | `str` | `required` | Name of the object. Default is empty string. |
| `size` | `POSITIONAL_OR_KEYWORD` | `int` | `required` | Parameter. |
| `n_bits` | `POSITIONAL_OR_KEYWORD` | `int` | `required` | Parameter. |
| `access` | `POSITIONAL_OR_KEYWORD` | `str` | `'RW'` | Parameter. |
| `has_coverage` | `POSITIONAL_OR_KEYWORD` | `int` | `<uvm_coverage_model_e.UVM_NO_COVERAGE: 0>` | Parameter. |

Output: `uvm_mem` instance

Module: `pyuvm`

The most basic UVM object

## Class `uvm_monitor`

Module: `pyuvm`

This class should be used as the base class for user-defined monitors.

Inputs

| Name | Kind | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `name` | `POSITIONAL_OR_KEYWORD` | `str` | `required` | The name of the component. Used in the UVM hierarchy |
| `parent` | `POSITIONAL_OR_KEYWORD` | `uvm_component` | `required` | The parent component.  If None, the parent is uvm_root |

## Class `uvm_nonblocking_get_export`

Module: `pyuvm`

The most basic UVM object

### Constructor

Signature: `uvm_nonblocking_get_export(self, name, parent)`

Inputs

| Name | Kind | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `name` | `POSITIONAL_OR_KEYWORD` | `str` | `required` | The name of the component. Used in the UVM hierarchy |
| `parent` | `POSITIONAL_OR_KEYWORD` | `uvm_component` | `required` | The parent component.  If None, the parent is uvm_root |

Output: `uvm_nonblocking_get_export` instance

### Methods

## Class `uvm_nonblocking_get_peek_export`

Module: `pyuvm`

The most basic UVM object

### Constructor

Signature: `uvm_nonblocking_get_peek_export(self, name, parent)`

Inputs

| Name | Kind | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `name` | `POSITIONAL_OR_KEYWORD` | `str` | `required` | The name of the component. Used in the UVM hierarchy |
| `parent` | `POSITIONAL_OR_KEYWORD` | `uvm_component` | `required` | The parent component.  If None, the parent is uvm_root |

Output: `uvm_nonblocking_get_peek_export` instance

## Class `uvm_nonblocking_get_peek_port`

Module: `pyuvm`

Access the non_blocking methods in export

### Constructor

Signature: `uvm_nonblocking_get_peek_port(self, name, parent)`

Inputs

| Name | Kind | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `name` | `POSITIONAL_OR_KEYWORD` | `str` | `required` | The name of the component. Used in the UVM hierarchy |
| `parent` | `POSITIONAL_OR_KEYWORD` | `uvm_component` | `required` | The parent component.  If None, the parent is uvm_root |

Output: `uvm_nonblocking_get_peek_port` instance

## Class `uvm_nonblocking_get_port`

Module: `pyuvm`

Access the non_blocking methods in export

### Constructor

Signature: `uvm_nonblocking_get_port(self, name, parent)`

Inputs

| Name | Kind | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `name` | `POSITIONAL_OR_KEYWORD` | `str` | `required` | The name of the component. Used in the UVM hierarchy |
| `parent` | `POSITIONAL_OR_KEYWORD` | `uvm_component` | `required` | The parent component.  If None, the parent is uvm_root |

Output: `uvm_nonblocking_get_port` instance

### Methods

## Class `uvm_nonblocking_master_export`

Module: `pyuvm`

The most basic UVM object

### Constructor

Signature: `uvm_nonblocking_master_export(self, name, parent)`

Inputs

| Name | Kind | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `name` | `POSITIONAL_OR_KEYWORD` | `str` | `required` | The name of the component. Used in the UVM hierarchy |
| `parent` | `POSITIONAL_OR_KEYWORD` | `uvm_component` | `required` | The parent component.  If None, the parent is uvm_root |

Output: `uvm_nonblocking_master_export` instance

## Class `uvm_nonblocking_master_port`

Module: `pyuvm`

Access the non_blocking put interface

### Constructor

Signature: `uvm_nonblocking_master_port(self, name, parent)`

Inputs

| Name | Kind | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `name` | `POSITIONAL_OR_KEYWORD` | `str` | `required` | The name of the component. Used in the UVM hierarchy |
| `parent` | `POSITIONAL_OR_KEYWORD` | `uvm_component` | `required` | The parent component.  If None, the parent is uvm_root |

Output: `uvm_nonblocking_master_port` instance

### Methods

## Class `uvm_nonblocking_peek_export`

Module: `pyuvm`

The most basic UVM object

### Constructor

Signature: `uvm_nonblocking_peek_export(self, name, parent)`

Inputs

| Name | Kind | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `name` | `POSITIONAL_OR_KEYWORD` | `str` | `required` | The name of the component. Used in the UVM hierarchy |
| `parent` | `POSITIONAL_OR_KEYWORD` | `uvm_component` | `required` | The parent component.  If None, the parent is uvm_root |

Output: `uvm_nonblocking_peek_export` instance

### Methods

## Class `uvm_nonblocking_peek_port`

Module: `pyuvm`

Try a peek

### Constructor

Signature: `uvm_nonblocking_peek_port(self, name, parent)`

Inputs

| Name | Kind | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `name` | `POSITIONAL_OR_KEYWORD` | `str` | `required` | The name of the component. Used in the UVM hierarchy |
| `parent` | `POSITIONAL_OR_KEYWORD` | `uvm_component` | `required` | The parent component.  If None, the parent is uvm_root |

Output: `uvm_nonblocking_peek_port` instance

## Class `uvm_nonblocking_put_export`

Module: `pyuvm`

The most basic UVM object

### Constructor

Signature: `uvm_nonblocking_put_export(self, name, parent)`

Inputs

| Name | Kind | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `name` | `POSITIONAL_OR_KEYWORD` | `str` | `required` | The name of the component. Used in the UVM hierarchy |
| `parent` | `POSITIONAL_OR_KEYWORD` | `uvm_component` | `required` | The parent component.  If None, the parent is uvm_root |

Output: `uvm_nonblocking_put_export` instance

### Methods

## Class `uvm_nonblocking_put_port`

Module: `pyuvm`

Access the non_blocking put interface

### Constructor

Signature: `uvm_nonblocking_put_port(self, name, parent)`

Inputs

| Name | Kind | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `name` | `POSITIONAL_OR_KEYWORD` | `str` | `required` | The name of the component. Used in the UVM hierarchy |
| `parent` | `POSITIONAL_OR_KEYWORD` | `uvm_component` | `required` | The parent component.  If None, the parent is uvm_root |

Output: `uvm_nonblocking_put_port` instance

### Methods

## Class `uvm_nonblocking_slave_export`

Module: `pyuvm`

The most basic UVM object

### Constructor

Signature: `uvm_nonblocking_slave_export(self, name, parent)`

Inputs

| Name | Kind | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `name` | `POSITIONAL_OR_KEYWORD` | `str` | `required` | The name of the component. Used in the UVM hierarchy |
| `parent` | `POSITIONAL_OR_KEYWORD` | `uvm_component` | `required` | The parent component.  If None, the parent is uvm_root |

Output: `uvm_nonblocking_slave_export` instance

## Class `uvm_nonblocking_slave_port`

Module: `pyuvm`

Access the non_blocking methods in export

### Constructor

Signature: `uvm_nonblocking_slave_port(self, name, parent)`

Inputs

| Name | Kind | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `name` | `POSITIONAL_OR_KEYWORD` | `str` | `required` | The name of the component. Used in the UVM hierarchy |
| `parent` | `POSITIONAL_OR_KEYWORD` | `uvm_component` | `required` | The parent component.  If None, the parent is uvm_root |

Output: `uvm_nonblocking_slave_port` instance

### Methods

## Class `uvm_nonblocking_transport_export`

Module: `pyuvm`

The most basic UVM object

### Constructor

Signature: `uvm_nonblocking_transport_export(self, name, parent)`

Inputs

| Name | Kind | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `name` | `POSITIONAL_OR_KEYWORD` | `str` | `required` | The name of the component. Used in the UVM hierarchy |
| `parent` | `POSITIONAL_OR_KEYWORD` | `uvm_component` | `required` | The parent component.  If None, the parent is uvm_root |

Output: `uvm_nonblocking_transport_export` instance

### Methods

## Class `uvm_nonblocking_transport_port`

Module: `pyuvm`

A ``uvm_port_base`` is a uvm_component with a ``connect()`` function.

### Constructor

Signature: `uvm_nonblocking_transport_port(self, name, parent)`

Inputs

| Name | Kind | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `name` | `POSITIONAL_OR_KEYWORD` | `str` | `required` | The name of the component. Used in the UVM hierarchy |
| `parent` | `POSITIONAL_OR_KEYWORD` | `uvm_component` | `required` | The parent component.  If None, the parent is uvm_root |

Output: `uvm_nonblocking_transport_port` instance

### Methods

## Class `uvm_peek_export`

Module: `pyuvm`

The most basic UVM object

### Constructor

Signature: `uvm_peek_export(self, name, parent)`

Inputs

| Name | Kind | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `name` | `POSITIONAL_OR_KEYWORD` | `str` | `required` | The name of the component. Used in the UVM hierarchy |
| `parent` | `POSITIONAL_OR_KEYWORD` | `uvm_component` | `required` | The parent component.  If None, the parent is uvm_root |

Output: `uvm_peek_export` instance

### Methods

## Class `uvm_peek_port`

Module: `pyuvm`

Provides access to the peek methods

### Constructor

Signature: `uvm_peek_port(self, name, parent)`

Inputs

| Name | Kind | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `name` | `POSITIONAL_OR_KEYWORD` | `str` | `required` | The name of the component. Used in the UVM hierarchy |
| `parent` | `POSITIONAL_OR_KEYWORD` | `uvm_component` | `required` | The parent component.  If None, the parent is uvm_root |

Output: `uvm_peek_port` instance

### Methods

## Class `uvm_port_base`

Module: `pyuvm`

A ``uvm_port_base`` is a uvm_component with a ``connect()`` function.

### Constructor

Signature: `uvm_port_base(self, name, parent)`

Inputs

| Name | Kind | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `name` | `POSITIONAL_OR_KEYWORD` | `str` | `required` | The name of the component. Used in the UVM hierarchy |
| `parent` | `POSITIONAL_OR_KEYWORD` | `uvm_component` | `required` | The parent component.  If None, the parent is uvm_root |

Output: `uvm_port_base` instance

## Class `uvm_predict_e`

| `UVM_PREDICT_DIRECT` | `0` | Enum member. |

## Class `uvm_put_export`

Module: `pyuvm`

The most basic UVM object

### Constructor

Signature: `uvm_put_export(self, name, parent)`

Inputs

| Name | Kind | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `name` | `POSITIONAL_OR_KEYWORD` | `str` | `required` | The name of the component. Used in the UVM hierarchy |
| `parent` | `POSITIONAL_OR_KEYWORD` | `uvm_component` | `required` | The parent component.  If None, the parent is uvm_root |

Output: `uvm_put_export` instance

## Class `uvm_put_port`

Module: `pyuvm`

Access the blocking put interfaces

### Constructor

Signature: `uvm_put_port(self, name, parent)`

Inputs

| Name | Kind | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `name` | `POSITIONAL_OR_KEYWORD` | `str` | `required` | The name of the component. Used in the UVM hierarchy |
| `parent` | `POSITIONAL_OR_KEYWORD` | `uvm_component` | `required` | The parent component.  If None, the parent is uvm_root |

Output: `uvm_put_port` instance

## Class `uvm_reg`

Module: `pyuvm`

The most basic UVM object

### Constructor

Signature: `uvm_reg(self, name='', n_bits: 'int' = 0, has_coverage: 'int' = 0, **kwargs) -> 'None'`

| `has_coverage` | `POSITIONAL_OR_KEYWORD` | `int` | `0` | Parameter. |

Module: `pyuvm`

The most basic UVM object

## Class `uvm_reg_predictor`

Module: `pyuvm`

The most basic UVM object

### Constructor

Signature: `uvm_reg_predictor(self, name: 'str', parent: 'uvm_component') -> 'None'`

Inputs

| Name | Kind | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `name` | `POSITIONAL_OR_KEYWORD` | `str` | `required` | The name of the component. Used in the UVM hierarchy |
| `parent` | `POSITIONAL_OR_KEYWORD` | `uvm_component` | `required` | The parent component.  If None, the parent is uvm_root |

Output: `uvm_reg_predictor` instance

## Class `uvm_reg_sequence`

Module: `pyuvm`

## Class `uvm_scoreboard`

Module: `pyuvm`

This class should be used as the base class for user-defined scoreboards.

### Constructor

Signature: `uvm_scoreboard(self, name, parent)`

Inputs

| Name | Kind | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `name` | `POSITIONAL_OR_KEYWORD` | `str` | `required` | The name of the component. Used in the UVM hierarchy |
| `parent` | `POSITIONAL_OR_KEYWORD` | `uvm_component` | `required` | The parent component.  If None, the parent is uvm_root |

Output: `uvm_scoreboard` instance

### Methods

## Class `uvm_seq_item_export`

Module: `pyuvm`

The sequence item port with a request queue and

### Constructor

| Name | Kind | Type | Default | Description |

## Class `uvm_seq_item_port`

Module: `pyuvm`

A ``uvm_port_base`` is a uvm_component with a ``connect()`` function.

### Constructor

Signature: `uvm_seq_item_port(self, name, parent)`

Inputs

| Name | Kind | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `name` | `POSITIONAL_OR_KEYWORD` | `str` | `required` | The name of the component. Used in the UVM hierarchy |
| `parent` | `POSITIONAL_OR_KEYWORD` | `uvm_component` | `required` | The parent component.  If None, the parent is uvm_root |

Output: `uvm_seq_item_port` instance

### Methods

## Class `uvm_sequencer`

Module: `pyuvm`

The uvm_sequencer arbitrates between multiple sequences that want to send

### Constructor

Signature: `uvm_sequencer(self, name, parent)`

Inputs

| Name | Kind | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `name` | `POSITIONAL_OR_KEYWORD` | `str` | `required` | The name of the component. Used in the UVM hierarchy |
| `parent` | `POSITIONAL_OR_KEYWORD` | `uvm_component` | `required` | The parent component.  If None, the parent is uvm_root |

Output: `uvm_sequencer` instance

### Methods

#### `uvm_sequencer.add_child`

No description available.

Signature: `add_child(self, name, child)`

Inputs

| Name | Kind | Type | Default | Description |

Module: `pyuvm`

## Class `uvm_slave_export`

Module: `pyuvm`

The most basic UVM object

### Constructor

Signature: `uvm_slave_export(self, name, parent)`

Inputs

| Name | Kind | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `name` | `POSITIONAL_OR_KEYWORD` | `str` | `required` | The name of the component. Used in the UVM hierarchy |
| `parent` | `POSITIONAL_OR_KEYWORD` | `uvm_component` | `required` | The parent component.  If None, the parent is uvm_root |

Output: `uvm_slave_export` instance

### Methods

## Class `uvm_slave_port`

Module: `pyuvm`

Access the non_blocking methods in export

### Constructor

Signature: `uvm_slave_port(self, name, parent)`

Inputs

| Name | Kind | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `name` | `POSITIONAL_OR_KEYWORD` | `str` | `required` | The name of the component. Used in the UVM hierarchy |
| `parent` | `POSITIONAL_OR_KEYWORD` | `uvm_component` | `required` | The parent component.  If None, the parent is uvm_root |

Output: `uvm_slave_port` instance

### Methods

## Class `uvm_test`

Module: `pyuvm`

The base class for all tests

### Constructor

Signature: `uvm_test(self, name, parent)`

Inputs

| Name | Kind | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `name` | `POSITIONAL_OR_KEYWORD` | `str` | `required` | The name of the component. Used in the UVM hierarchy |
| `parent` | `POSITIONAL_OR_KEYWORD` | `uvm_component` | `required` | The parent component.  If None, the parent is uvm_root |

Output: `uvm_test` instance

### Methods

## Class `uvm_tlm_fifo`

Module: `pyuvm`

Declares and instantiate the exports needed to communicate

### Constructor

Signature: `uvm_tlm_fifo(self, name=None, parent=None, size=1)`

| `size` | `POSITIONAL_OR_KEYWORD` | `int` | `1` | Parameter. |

## Class `uvm_tlm_fifo_base`

Module: `pyuvm`

Declares and instantiate the exports needed to communicate

### Constructor

Signature: `uvm_tlm_fifo_base(self, name, parent, maxsize=1)`

Inputs

| Name | Kind | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `name` | `POSITIONAL_OR_KEYWORD` | `str` | `required` | The name of the component. Used in the UVM hierarchy |
| `parent` | `POSITIONAL_OR_KEYWORD` | `uvm_component` | `required` | The parent component.  If None, the parent is uvm_root |
| `maxsize` | `POSITIONAL_OR_KEYWORD` | `int` | `1` | Parameter. |

Output: `uvm_tlm_fifo_base` instance

## Class `uvm_tlm_req_rsp_channel`

Module: `pyuvm`

The most basic UVM object

### Constructor

Signature: `uvm_tlm_req_rsp_channel(self, name, parent=None, request_fifo_size=1, response_fifo_size=1)`

Inputs

| Name | Kind | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `name` | `POSITIONAL_OR_KEYWORD` | `str` | `required` | The name of the component. Used in the UVM hierarchy |
| `parent` | `POSITIONAL_OR_KEYWORD` | `uvm_component` | `None` | The parent component.  If None, the parent is uvm_root |
| `request_fifo_size` | `POSITIONAL_OR_KEYWORD` | `int` | `1` | Parameter. |
| `response_fifo_size` | `POSITIONAL_OR_KEYWORD` | `int` | `1` | Parameter. |

Output: `uvm_tlm_req_rsp_channel` instance

## Class `uvm_tlm_transport_channel`

Module: `pyuvm`

The most basic UVM object

### Constructor

Signature: `uvm_tlm_transport_channel(self, name, parent=None)`

Inputs

| Name | Kind | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `name` | `POSITIONAL_OR_KEYWORD` | `str` | `required` | The name of the component. Used in the UVM hierarchy |
| `parent` | `POSITIONAL_OR_KEYWORD` | `uvm_component` | `None` | The parent component.  If None, the parent is uvm_root |

Output: `uvm_tlm_transport_channel` instance

## Class `uvm_transport_export`

Module: `pyuvm`

The most basic UVM object

### Constructor

Signature: `uvm_transport_export(self, name, parent)`

Inputs

| Name | Kind | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `name` | `POSITIONAL_OR_KEYWORD` | `str` | `required` | The name of the component. Used in the UVM hierarchy |
| `parent` | `POSITIONAL_OR_KEYWORD` | `uvm_component` | `required` | The parent component.  If None, the parent is uvm_root |

Output: `uvm_transport_export` instance

### Methods

## Class `uvm_transport_port`

Module: `pyuvm`

A ``uvm_port_base`` is a uvm_component with a ``connect()`` function.

### Constructor

Signature: `uvm_transport_port(self, name, parent)`

Inputs

| Name | Kind | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `name` | `POSITIONAL_OR_KEYWORD` | `str` | `required` | The name of the component. Used in the UVM hierarchy |
| `parent` | `POSITIONAL_OR_KEYWORD` | `uvm_component` | `required` | The parent component.  If None, the parent is uvm_root |

Output: `uvm_transport_port` instance

### Methods
